text:
Created attachment 205529
Patch

plata-theme has been updated to 0.8.7.

Upstream changes:
- Re-designed GtkInfoBar (Gtk 3.2x/4.0).
- Added .spacer-box styling for SpacerApplet (Cinnamon).
- Added :shaded pseudo-class styling for WorkspaceSwitcherApplet simple-buttons (Cinnamon).
- Applied Caja theming even if --disable-mate (Gtk 3.2x/4.0).

https://gitlab.com/tista500/plata-theme/-/tags/0.8.7

QA:
poudriere testport OK (releng/12.0 amd64)
